# Environment variable catalog

Derived from [`src/core/config/env-schema.ts`](../../src/core/config/env-schema.ts)
(Zod schema, `envFieldDescriptions`, per-env `envProfiles.defaults`) and the deploy
classification in [`tooling/setup/setup.config.json`](../../tooling/setup/setup.config.json).
Regenerate with `pnpm env:catalog`; `pnpm env:catalog:check` fails on drift.

**Kind** вЂ” `secret`: GitHub Environment Secret (`secrets.*`), always pushed by
`github:sync`. `variable`: GitHub Environment Variable (`vars.*`), pushed only when
missing/different and pruned when equal to the schema default. `buildВ·local`:
build-time or local-only, never synced to a GitHub Environment.

| Key | Kind | Schema default | development | production | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `BUILD_I18N_LOCALE` | buildВ·local | `en-US` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Primary i18n build locale, BCP-47 (e.g. en-US). |
| `BUILD_I18N_MODE` | buildВ·local | `single` | вЂ” | вЂ” | i18n build mode: single (inline one locale into JS) or multi (lazy JSON per locale). |
| `CONTEXT7_API_KEY` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Context7 docs-MCP API key; consumed by .mcp.json for the docs MCP (local tooling). |
| `NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Netlify CLI deploy token (CI only). |
| `NETLIFY_SITE_ID` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Netlify site ID (deploy target). |
| `NODE_VERSION` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Node version for CI/build; keep in lock step with .nvmrc. |
| `SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry source-map upload token (CI only); see docs/integrations/sentry-sourcemaps.md. |
| `SENTRY_ORG` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry organization slug (source-map upload). |
| `SENTRY_PROJECT` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry project slug (source-map upload). |
| `SONAR_ADMIN_PASSWORD` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Local SonarQube admin password; auto-managed by tooling/sonar/sonar-gate.mjs (never in CI). |
| `SONAR_TOKEN` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Local SonarQube scanner token; auto-managed by the sonar gate (never in CI). |
| `VITE_API_BASE_URL` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Production API base URL (e.g. https://api.example.com); empty = same-origin. Required in production when the API is not same-origin. |
| `VITE_APP_ENV` | buildВ·local | `local` | `development` | `production` | Reported environment: local (default) \| development \| production. The env vocabulary, not the Vite mode; reported-only (Sentry/PostHog tag), never branched on. |
| `VITE_APP_VERSION` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | App version string; read by vite.config.ts (names the Sentry release, fallback 0.0.0) and the client. CI-set; blank locally. |
| `VITE_AUTH_EMAIL` | buildВ·local | `true` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Enable email/OTP auth on /login (default true). |
| `VITE_AUTH_OAUTH_APPLE` | buildВ·local | `false` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Enable Apple OAuth on /login (default false). |
| `VITE_AUTH_OAUTH_AUTO_GOOGLE` | buildВ·local | `false` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Auto-start Google OAuth on /login; requires VITE_AUTH_OAUTH_GOOGLE not false (default false). |
| `VITE_AUTH_OAUTH_GITHUB` | buildВ·local | `true` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Enable GitHub OAuth on /login (default true). |
| `VITE_AUTH_OAUTH_GOOGLE` | buildВ·local | `true` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Enable Google OAuth on /login (default true). |
| `VITE_AUTH_PASSKEY` | buildВ·local | `true` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Enable passkey/WebAuthn auth on /login (default true). |
| `VITE_CAPTCHA_DISABLED` | variable | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | "true" disables the Turnstile CAPTCHA (local dev; pair with the core-be test secret). |
| `VITE_CSP_REPORT_URI` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | CSP violation report collector URI (optional). |
| `VITE_DEBUG_LOGGING` | variable | `false` | `true` | `false` | "true" emits [Module] diagnostic console logs (on locally and in the development deploy, off in production). |
| `VITE_DEV_API_URL` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Dev server only: Vite proxy target for /api. |
| `VITE_DEVTOOLS` | variable | `false` | `true` | `false` | "true" mounts React Query Devtools + the localhost debug panel + theme-shuffle shortcut. |
| `VITE_DISABLED_MODULES` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Comma-separated module keys to disable (e.g. billing,members); routes 404 via the module gate. |
| `VITE_E2E_HOOKS` | variable | `false` | `false` | `false` | "true" installs Playwright E2E hooks on globalThis (navigateInApp, establishSession). |
| `VITE_LAYOUT_WIDTH` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | App layout width: contained (default), full, or reading. |
| `VITE_PERSONAL_ORGANIZATIONS` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Tri-state override for personal-org deployment mode (true/false/unset). |
| `VITE_POSTHOG_HOST` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | PostHog host (optional); pairs with VITE_POSTHOG_KEY. |
| `VITE_POSTHOG_KEY` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | PostHog project key (optional); analytics is gated behind consent. |
| `VITE_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Privacy-policy URL shown in the consent banner/footer (optional). |
| `VITE_SENTRY_DSN` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry DSN (public client key); empty disables Sentry. |
| `VITE_SENTRY_PROFILES_SAMPLE_RATE` | variable | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry profiles sample rate 0..1 (default 1.0). |
| `VITE_SENTRY_REPLAYS_ON_ERROR_SAMPLE_RATE` | variable | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry on-error replay sample rate 0..1 (default 1.0). |
| `VITE_SENTRY_REPLAYS_SESSION_SAMPLE_RATE` | variable | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry session-replay sample rate 0..1 (prod-safe default 0.1). |
| `VITE_SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE` | variable | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Sentry traces sample rate 0..1 (prod-safe default 0.1). |
| `VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Stripe publishable key (pk_test_ in dev, pk_live_ in prod); public, safe to expose. |
| `VITE_TEAM_ORGANIZATIONS` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Tri-state override for team-org deployment mode (true/false/unset). |
| `VITE_THEME_LOCK` | buildВ·local | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | "true" hides the runtime theme switcher + shuffle. |
| `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY` | secret | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | Cloudflare Turnstile site key; required in production unless VITE_CAPTCHA_DISABLED is true. |
| `VITE_VERSION_CHECK` | variable | `true` | `true` | `true` | "true" polls /version.json for new deployments (off locally, on in deployed envs; never started by the test runner). |

## Deploy secrets (`secrets.*`)

- `NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN`
- `NETLIFY_SITE_ID`
- `SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN`
- `SENTRY_ORG`
- `SENTRY_PROJECT`
- `VITE_API_BASE_URL`
- `VITE_CSP_REPORT_URI`
- `VITE_POSTHOG_HOST`
- `VITE_POSTHOG_KEY`
- `VITE_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL`
- `VITE_SENTRY_DSN`
- `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY`

## Deploy variables (`vars.*`)

Diffed on `github:sync`: pushed only when missing or changed; a value equal to its
runtime schema default (the env-independent Zod fallback) is not pushed and is pruned
from GitHub (the runtime falls back to the identical default). The per-env columns
above are scaffold values, which may differ. Preview with `pnpm github:sync <env> --diff`.

- `VITE_CAPTCHA_DISABLED`
- `VITE_DEBUG_LOGGING`
- `VITE_DEVTOOLS`
- `VITE_E2E_HOOKS`
- `VITE_SENTRY_PROFILES_SAMPLE_RATE`
- `VITE_SENTRY_REPLAYS_ON_ERROR_SAMPLE_RATE`
- `VITE_SENTRY_REPLAYS_SESSION_SAMPLE_RATE`
- `VITE_SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE`
- `VITE_VERSION_CHECK`
